summary: Completed testing of PDF generation feature for Contrats CCPA. All backend API tests passed (8/8 = 100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The PDF endpoints work correctly and the UI buttons are properly displayed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa returns list of contrats (5 found)
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/pdf returns Content-Disposition: inline (for browser viewing)
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/pdf returns PDF starting with %PDF magic bytes
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/download returns valid PDF with Content-Type: application/pdf
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/download returns Content-Disposition: attachment (for download)
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/download includes filename in Content-Disposition header
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/pdf returns 404 for non-existent contrat
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/download returns 404 for non-existent contrat
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id} returns contrat details with all required fields
Frontend: PDF button (FileDown icon with red color text-red-600) visible in Actions column
Frontend: PDF button has title='Voir le PDF' attribute
Frontend: 'Voir le PDF' button visible in contrat view dialog
Frontend: 'Télécharger' button visible in contrat view dialog
Frontend: PDF buttons are clickable and enabled
seed_data_creation: Used existing contrats CCPA for testing. No new seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature for Contrats CCPA is fully functional. The /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/pdf endpoint returns PDF inline for browser viewing, and /api/contrats-ccpa/{id}/download returns PDF as attachment for download. Frontend has PDF button (red FileDown icon) in table Actions column and 'Voir le PDF' + 'Télécharger' buttons in the view dialog.
